'''najusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherbedding|featherbedding]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-j-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherbedding|featherbedding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| najusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næjisith|næjisith]] || [[word:næjisij|næjisij]] || [[word:næjisish|næjisish]] || [[word:næjisi|næjisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:najujusuth|najujusuth]] || [[word:najujusuj|najujusuj]] || [[word:najujusush|najujusush]] || [[word:najujusu|najujusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:najusuth|najusuth]] || [[word:najusuj|najusuj]] || [[word:najusush|najusush]] || [[word:najusu|najusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:najufsufth|najufsufth]] || [[word:najufsufj|najufsufj]] || [[word:najufsufsh|najufsufsh]] || [[word:najufsuf|najufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:najusuthu|najusuthu]] || [[word:najusuju|najusuju]] || [[word:najusushu|najusushu]] || [[word:najusuku|najusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:najusuth|najusuth]] || [[word:najusuj|najusuj]] || [[word:najusush|najusush]] || [[word:najusu|najusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:najusuthul|najusuthul]] || [[word:najusujul|najusujul]] || [[word:najusushul|najusushul]] || [[word:najusukul|najusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:najusuuthuthu|najusuuthuthu]] || [[word:najusuujuju|najusuujuju]] || [[word:najusuushushu|najusuushushu]] || [[word:najusuuku|najusuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:najusuthun|najusuthun]] || [[word:najusujun|najusujun]] || [[word:najusushun|najusushun]] || [[word:najusukun|najusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:najusuthuoro|najusuthuoro]] || [[word:najusujuoro|najusujuoro]] || [[word:najusushuoro|najusushuoro]] || [[word:najusukuoro|najusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
